MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gary M. Cohen, General Counsel and Antonio A. Celaya, Staff Counsel of CALIFORNIA DEPT. OF INSURANCE 538-4010, for defendants John Garamendi and DEPT. OF INSURANCE of the State of California, demurring to complaint
Gregory A. Long, Esq. and Fred R. Puglisi, Esq. of SHEPPARD MULLIN 213/620-1780, for plaintiff State Compensation Insurance Fund opposing the motion

RULING:
Parties submitted to the tentative ruling and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANTS JOHN GARAMENDI and DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled; defendant has 20 days to answer. (JLW/301/CW) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
